name: Charley Patton
abstract: Charlie Patton (April 1891 (probable) – April 28, 1934), more often spelled Charley Patton, was an American Delta blues musician and songwriter. Considered by many to be the "Father of the Delta Blues", he created an enduring body of American music and inspired most Delta blues musicians.

about_quotes.speaker: Clay Jenkins
about_quotes.evidence: I know what you mean when you listen to Son House and Charley Patton and all that... I really dove into that [Mississippi Delta guys, like Son House and Robert Johnson...]
about_quotes.doc_title: Clay Jenkins interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, March 18, 2016
